title: FM Radio
profTagline: Live FM, decoded on-device from your HackRF
installDesc: Add to your home screen for full-screen listening.
installIosHint: Tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: Open the browser menu and choose Install.
connectBody: Plug the HackRF into this phone with a USB-C OTG cable, then grant access. Every sample is decoded here on your device — nothing is sent or recorded.
noUsb: This browser has no WebUSB. Open in Chrome on Android or desktop.
